sections.title: Control Center (Dashboard)
sections.content: The Dashboard is your strategy control center, designed for comprehensive real-time monitoring of the builder's operations. Instead of cluttered charts and orderbooks duplicating trading terminals, it aggregates key performance indicators, signal activity, and integration management.

subsections.title: Key Widgets:
subsections.content:
- **KPI Panel**: Displays the status of active strategies, signal count today/week/hour, and Hermes AI filter status.
- **Signal Activity (Sparkline)**: An interactive mini-chart of signal generation activity over the last 7 days.
- **Quick Actions**: Instant navigation buttons to the Canvas Builder, Backtest, Templates, or Integration Settings.
- **Live Signal Feed**: Real-time signal stream connected via WebSocket with type, pair, and strategy indicators.
- **Top Strategies**: Leaderboard of the most active algorithms by signal count.
- **Market Pulse**: Compact ticker tape showing current prices of top coins and their 24h changes.

> **Tip:** Use the "Quick Actions" section for fast navigation across key areas of the platform.

sections.title: Canvas Builder Interface
sections.content:
### Node Library Panel (Left)

Drag and drop nodes onto the canvas. Categories:
- **Inputs** ‚Äî markPrice, fundingRate
- **Indicators** ‚Äî RSI, EMA, SMA, MACD, BB, Stochastic, Volume
- **Comparison** ‚Äî conditions and thresholds
- **Logic** ‚Äî AND / OR
- **SMC Concepts** ‚Äî Market Structure, FVG, Order Block, Liquidity Sweep
- **Special** ‚Äî Cross, Time Filter, Pump/Dump, Power of 3, Daily Bias
- **Order Flow** ‚Äî Delta, CVD, Orderbook
- **üßÝ AI Forecast** ‚Äî Sentiment, ML Filter, Hermes Agent, Kronos Forecast
- **Signal** ‚Äî LONG / SHORT

subsections.title: Canvas (Center)
subsections.content:
| Action | How |
|---|---|
| Move Node | Left Click & Drag header |
| Connect Nodes | Drag from output handle to input handle |
| Delete Connection | Select line ‚Üí Delete |
| Delete Node | Select node ‚Üí Delete |
| Zoom | Ctrl + Mouse Wheel |
| Pan | Space + Left Click & Drag |

subsections.title: Inline Parameter Editing
subsections.content: **Click on a node** ‚Äî interactive parameter fields expand directly in the node's body. Changes are applied instantly via the Zustand store. The right properties panel is also available for advanced settings.

subsections.title: Top Header Toolbar
subsections.content:
- **Save** ‚Äî Save the strategy to the database
- **Load Template** ‚Äî Library of pre-configured strategies
- **Import Pine Script** ‚Äî Auto-build graph from TradingView Pine Script code
- **Pair / Timeframe** ‚Äî Settings for the active strategy

---

sections.title: Template Library
sections.content:
The **"Load Template"** button opens a library of 20 pre-configured strategies.

| Category | Approach |
|---|---|
| **Trend** | EMA, MACD |
| **Pullback** | RSI oversold in a trend |
| **Smart Money** | FVG, Order Block, Structure |
| **Momentum** | Momentum, Stochastic, Pump/Dump |
| **Session** | Killzone (London, New York) |
| **Funding** | Funding Rate strategies |
| **AI Filter** | With Hermes or ML-filter |

subsections.title: How to Use
subsections.content:
1. Select a template ‚Üí **"Show Logic"**
2. Click **"Load to Builder"**
3. Adjust parameters and trading pair
4. Save ‚Üí Run Backtest

---

sections.title: Node Types - Complete Reference
sections.content: Below is an automatically generated list of all available blocks in the system registry.

| **Funding Rate** | Parameters: pair: '', operator: 'none' |

> By default, indicators take candle close price. INPUT is only needed to work with markPrice or fundingRate explicitly.

---

subsections.title: 3.2 INDICATOR ‚Äî Technical Indicators
subsections.content:
#### RSI
- **Parameters:** `period` (14)
- **Returns:** value 0‚Äì100
- **Usage:** RSI > 50 (bullish momentum), RSI < 30 (oversold)

#### SMA / EMA
- **Parameters:** `period` (SMA: 50, EMA: 20/50)
- **Usage:** EMA(20) > EMA(50) ‚Üí uptrend

#### MACD
- **Parameters:** `fast` (12), `slow` (26), `signal` (9)
- **Properties:** `histogram`, `MACD`, `signal`
- **Usage:** histogram > 0 ‚Üí buyers control

#### Bollinger Bands
- **Parameters:** `period` (20), `stdDev` (2)
- **Properties:** `upper`, `middle`, `lower`

#### Stochastic
- **Parameters:** `period` (14), `signalPeriod` (3)
- **Properties:** `k`, `d`

#### Volume
- **Parameters:** `period` ‚Äî number of candles for average
- **Usage:** filtering weak market moves

---

subsections.title: 3.3 COMPARISON ‚Äî Comparison Nodes
subsections.content:
Compares two values, returns `true` / `false`.

| Operator | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `>` | A greater than B |
| `<` | A less than B |
| `>=` | A greater or equal to B |
| `<=` | A less or equal to B |
| `==` | A equals B (strings: 'BULLISH', 'bearish') |

**Value field:** if input B is not connected, the static value in parameters is used.

---

subsections.title: 3.4 AI ‚Äî Forecasts & Agents
subsections.content:
#### üßÝ Hermes Agent
- **Purpose:** Autonomous LLM filter (based on Nous Hermes 3 or GPT-4).
- **Modes:**
  - `Filter`: Returns PASS or BLOCK signal. Returns `true` / `false`.
  - `Score`: Returns confidence level 0.0‚Äì1.0.
- **Logic:** The agent receives current market context (price, RSI, volatility) and your custom prompt. It makes a decision based on "market logic" and patterns that are hard to describe mathematically.
- **Caching:** Saves API costs by caching results for N minutes per pair.

#### üîÆ AI Forecast (Kronos)
- **Models:** Kronos-Base (102M), Small (24M), Mini (4M).
- **Parameters:** `predLen` (forecast depth in candles), `minConfidence` (confidence threshold).
- **Properties:** `direction` (UP/DOWN), `predicted_change` (expected % change).

---

---

subsections.title: 3.5 LOGIC ‚Äî Logic Nodes
subsections.content:
| Operator | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `AND` | All inputs must be `true` |
| `OR` | At least one input must be `true` |

Supports any number of inputs. The Logic output goes to Signal or another Logic node.

---

subsections.title: 3.6 SIGNAL ‚Äî Signal Nodes
subsections.content:
Final node of a strategy. Type: `LONG` or `SHORT`.

> Each strategy **must** end with a Signal node.

---

subsections.title: 3.7 CROSS ‚Äî Cross Crossover Nodes
subsections.content:
Triggers **only at the exact moment** when two lines cross (unlike Comparison).

- `above` ‚Äî A crosses B from bottom up (bullish)
- `below` ‚Äî A crosses B from top down (bearish)

---

subsections.title: 3.8 TIME FILTER ‚Äî Session Time Filter
subsections.content:
Restricts strategy operations to specific hours of the day (UTC).

- `from` / `to` ‚Äî window in HH:MM format
- London: 07:00‚Äì10:00, New York: 13:30‚Äì16:00, Asia: 22:00‚Äì08:00

> Time Filter output is typically connected directly to a Logic AND node.

---

subsections.title: 3.9 MARKET STRUCTURE ‚Äî Market Structure Nodes
subsections.content:
Identifies the trend through swing points (BOS / CHoCH).

- `trend` ‚Üí `'bullish'` / `'bearish'` / `'ranging'`
- `lastBOS` / `lastCHoCH` ‚Äî last structure break events
- **Parameters:** `lookback` (150)

---

subsections.title: 3.9 FVG ‚Äî Fair Value Gap
subsections.content:
Checks whether the price is within an unfilled fair value gap.

- **Returns:** `true` / `false`
- **Parameters:** `lookback`

---

subsections.title: 3.10 ORDER BLOCK ‚Äî Order Block Nodes
subsections.content:
Zone of institutional buying/selling interest (reversal bar before momentum).

- **Parameters:** `lookback`, `obType` (`'BULLISH'` / `'BEARISH'`)
- **Returns:** `true` if price is within a block of the chosen type

---

subsections.title: 3.11 LIQUIDITY SWEEP ‚Äî Liquidity Sweeps
subsections.content:
Price pierced a level but closed back within the range (manipulation).

- **Parameters:** `sweepType` ‚Äî `'HIGH'` / `'LOW'` / `'ANY'`

---

subsections.title: 3.12 PUMP / DUMP
subsections.content:
Abnormal price movements accompanied by high volume.

- **Parameters:** `priceThreshold` (%), `volMultiplier`, `lookback`

---

subsections.title: 3.13 DAILY BIAS ‚Äî Daily Bias
subsections.content:
Previous day's trend bias: `'BULLISH'` / `'BEARISH'` / `'NEUTRAL'`.

> Recommended for 15m‚Äì1h timeframes.

---

subsections.title: 3.14 POWER OF 3 (PO3)
subsections.content:
ICT concept: Accumulation ‚Üí Manipulation ‚Üí Distribution.

| Phase | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `'ACCUMULATION'` | Consolidation near daily open |
| `'MANIPULATION_LOW_COMPLETED'` | Judas Swing down completed ‚Üí LONG |
| `'MANIPULATION_HIGH_COMPLETED'` | Judas Swing up completed ‚Üí SHORT |
| `'DISTRIBUTION'` | Active price expansion from open |

---

subsections.title: 3.15 ORDER FLOW ‚Äî Order Flow
subsections.content:
Analyzes buy/sell volume imbalance and cumulative volume delta.

- **Metrics:** `imbalance` (orderbook tilt), `cvd` (cumulative delta), `delta` (current candle delta)
- **Parameters:** `metric`, `period`
- **Usage:** CVD rises as price drops ‚Üí hidden accumulation

---

subsections.title: 3.16 ORDERBOOK ‚Äî Order Book Analyzer
subsections.content:
Real-time orderbook depth analyzer.

- **Metrics:** `imbalance` (bid/ask ratio), `wallDetect` (large block wall detection)
- **Parameters:** `levels` (depth of analysis, default is 20)

---

subsections.title: 3.17 MARKET SENTIMENT ‚Äî Sentiment Ticker
subsections.content:
Aggregated sentiment score from news and social feeds.

- **Returns:** `score` (-1 to +1), `label` (`'BULLISH'` / `'BEARISH'` / `'NEUTRAL'`)
- **Usage:** Comparison with `score > 0.3` to filter for bullish environment

---

subsections.title: 3.18 ML FILTER ‚Äî Machine Learning Filter
subsections.content:
Predicts signal success probability using a custom-trained ML model (Kronos).

- **Parameters:** `minConfidence` (confidence threshold, 0‚Äì1), `timeframe`
- **Returns:** `true` if model confidence is above threshold
- **Usage:** Add as the final filter to a Logic AND node to only trigger high-probability signals

---

subsections.title: 3.19 HERMES AGENT ‚Äî AI Agent Node
subsections.content:
Connects an intelligent LLM agent (Nous Hermes) to filter signals based on natural language market context.

**Modes of Operation:**
| Mode | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `filter` | Agent decides PASS / BLOCK. Returns `true` / `false` |
| `score` | Agent returns confidence score (0‚Äì1), needs a Comparison node for threshold |

**Parameters:**
- `mode` ‚Äî `filter` or `score`
- `model` ‚Äî LLM model: `nous-hermes-3:8b` (local via Ollama) or `openai/gpt-4o` (cloud)
- `promptTemplate` ‚Äî request template describing market context
- `cacheDuration` ‚Äî cache duration in minutes (reduces latency)

**How it works:**
1. Engine builds market context: pair, timeframe, price, indicators
2. Injects into `promptTemplate` and sends to Hermes Agent API
3. Cache results in Redis for `cacheDuration` minutes
4. During backtests, mocks are used (`isBacktest: true`) instead of live API calls

> **Note:** Hermes adds latency (200‚Äì500ms local, 500‚Äì3000ms cloud). Always use caching.

---

subsections.title: 3.20 KRONOS FORECAST ‚Äî AI Forecasting
subsections.content:
Price direction forecast utilizing the built-in deep neural network model (Kronos via Ollama).

- **Parameters:** `horizon` (forecast horizon in candles), `minConfidence`
- **Returns:** `true` when confidence exceeds the threshold

---

subsections.title: 3.21 SCANNER NODE ‚Äî Multi-Pair Scanner
subsections.content:
Monitors multiple trading pairs simultaneously and forwards signals when condition is met.

- **Parameters:** pair list, timeframe, scan condition

---

subsections.title: 3.22 USER LEVEL ‚Äî Custom User Level
subsections.content:
Allows manual price level placement (support/resistance) and triggers signal when price approaches it.

- **Parameters:** `price` (level price), `tolerance` (% deviation limit)

---

sections.title: Backtest
sections.content: The **Backtest** page checks strategy performance on historical data.

subsections.title: Launch Parameters
subsections.content:
| Parameter | Description | Recommendation |
|---|---|---|
| **Strategy** | Select from saved strategies | ‚Äî |
| **Period** | Start and End dates | At least 3 months |
| **Initial Balance** | Starting balance in USD | 1000 |
| **Fee** | Trading fee percent | 0.001 = 0.1% |
| **Take Profit** | TP % from entry price | 2‚Äì5% |
| **Stop Loss** | SL % from entry price | 1‚Äì2% |
| **Position Size** | Allocation % from balance | 80‚Äì90% |

> Data for new periods is fetched dynamically from Binance upon first launch ‚Äî up to 1‚Äì3 minutes.

> During backtests, **Hermes Agent API calls are mocked** (`isBacktest: true`) to avoid excessive latency.

subsections.title: Performance Metrics
subsections.content:
| Metric | Meaning | Target Value |
|---|---|---|
| **Win Rate** | % of profitable trades | > 50% |
| **Profit Factor** | Gross Profit / Gross Loss | > 1.5 |
| **Max Drawdown** | Peak-to-trough drop | < 20% |
| **Sharpe Ratio** | Return / volatility | > 1.0 |
| **Risk-Reward Ratio** | Average Win / Average Loss | > 1.5 |
| **Recovery Factor** | Net Profit / Max Drawdown | > 2.0 |

subsections.title: Trade Ledger Table
subsections.content:
Each trade records: execution time, direction, price, PnL $/%, indicator metadata (e.g. RSI level, AI decision).

---

sections.title: Fleet Management
sections.content: The **Fleet Management** dashboard allows you to execute strategies in live/paper mode as independent, containerized Docker instances.

subsections.title: Key Features:
subsections.content:
- **Central Command**: Monitor PnL, balance, and active positions across all running bot instances.
- **PANIC STOP**: Instant emergency stop button that halts all bots and closes all active open positions.
- **Correlation Matrix**: Analyzes mathematical relationships between pairs in the fleet. Correlation > 0.8 (red zone) warns of high risk due to identical portfolio exposure.
- **Risk Level**: Dynamically calculates a portfolio risk rating based on volatility and asset correlation.

---

sections.title: AI Model Training: ML Intelligence Trainer
sections.content: This module allows you to train custom predictive models (Random Forest / XGBoost) based on your custom canvas strategy flow.

subsections.title: Training Pipeline:
subsections.content:
1. **Select Strategy**: System parses your flow graph and extracts all indicators as training features.
2. **Parameters**: Define the target trading pair, timeframe, and prediction horizon (e.g., price action in 24 candles).
3. **Feature Importance**: Post-training, view details about which indicators (e.g., RSI, OB, CVD) have the most predictive power.
4. **Validation**: Model accuracy above 60% qualifies it for live filtering within the `ML Filter` node.

---

sections.title: Cross-Exchange Analytics
sections.content:
Analytical tools to uncover alpha through real-time price anomalies across different exchanges.

- **Deltas**: Compares live Binance prices against Bybit and OKX.
- **Arbitrage Alerts**: Highlights pairs with pricing spreads > 0.1% for potential arbitrage trade execution.
- **Market Sync**: Identifies which exchange leads momentum moves (Smart Money Flow detection).

---

sections.title: Settings & Risk Management
sections.content: The **Settings** console is critical for secure live bot execution.

subsections.title: Telegram & Alerts
subsections.content:
- Connect your custom `Bot Token` and `Chat ID`.
- Send a verification message before launching strategies.
- Add Discord Webhooks as an alternative alerting channel.

subsections.title: Third-Party AI Integration
subsections.content:
- **Heym MCP**: Run analytic workflow engines. Allows checking and connecting external servers.
- **Hermes AI Agent**: Manage API endpoints (Ollama, custom agent, or OpenAI-compatible). Set API keys (masked on input), hosts, and model names. Test the connection instantly from the interface.
- All settings are saved dynamically to PostgreSQL (Hot-Reload supported).

subsections.title: Global Risk Controls (Safety First)
subsections.content:
- **Global Pause**: Instantly halts signal generation across all active strategies.
- **BTC/ETH Drop Threshold**: Safe mode trigger. If BTC drops more than X% in 24h, bots enter a pause state to protect capital.

subsections.title: Risk & Exposure Limits
subsections.content:
- **Daily Loss Limit**: Cap on daily net losses. Halts all trading activity once hit.
- **Max Active Signals**: Limit on simultaneous positions to manage portfolio leverage and margin.
- **Deduplication Interval**: Setup a silence period (e.g., 4 hours) per pair to avoid repeating entries on the same swing.

---
